data.body:
## Description

**What**: Extend the ticket system to support a tags array field on tickets, enabling machine-readable metadata like scrutiny:pending
**Why**: Stories 4 and 5 in this epic require writing and reading structured tags. The current ticket-edit.sh ALLOWED_FIELDS is limited to title/priority/assignee/ticket_type/description — no tag support exists
**Scope**:
- IN: Add tags array field to ticket-edit.sh, ticket-reducer.py, ticket-show.sh; support add/remove operations
- OUT: Tag-based filtering in ticket-list.sh (can be added later); UI/display formatting of tags

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a practitioner can write a tag to a ticket via ticket edit and read it back via ticket show, with the tag persisted across sessions
  ← Satisfies: "each epic's ticket includes a structured scrutiny:pending tag readable by downstream skills"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD DoD

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Tag field schema: use a simple JSON array of strings in the ticket event model; reducer accumulates tags across events
- [Dependency] This is a prerequisite for Stories 4 and 5 — must ship first
